title: crotalaria poliochlora
intro: Crotalaria poliochlora is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the poliochlorus crotalaria or golden bush. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria poliochlora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even show promise in the treatment of certain cancers. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas or infused in oil for topical applications.
